title: SAPResult
description: SAPResult: An individual result for a single iteration of a SAP analysis on a dwelling.

DwellingName.description: The name of the dwelling (the plot reference).

DwellingCount.description: The number of dwellings in the block that match this dwelling type.

Iteration.description: The name of the iteration analysed.

TotalFloorArea.description: The floor area of a single dwelling of this type. Also referred to as the Total Floor Area (TFA).

FloorAreaByBlock.description: The total floor area of the dwelling type, calculated as the TotalFloorArea multiplied by the DwellingCount.

WallArea.description: The total wall area of the dwelling.

WindowArea.description: The total window area of the dwelling.

WallToFloorRatio.description: The ratio of walls to floor for the dwelling.

WindowToFloorRatio.description: The ratio of windows to floor for the dwelling.

WindowToWallRatio.description: The ratio of window to wall for the dwelling.

NotionalWindowArea.description: The total notional window area of the dwelling as your benchmark.

NotionalWindowToWallRatio.description: The ratio of the notional window to wall for the dwelling.

DER.description: The Dwelling Emission Rate (DER) - calculated as part of the analysis.

TER.description: The Target Emission Rate (TER) for the dwelling.

DERTERImprovement.description: The improvement of Emission Rate between the Target (TER) and actual (DER). Calculated as ( (TER - DER) / TER).

DPER.description: The Dwelling Primary Energy Rating (DPER) for the dwelling - calculated as part of the analysis.

TPER.description: The Target Primary Energy Rating (TPER) for the dwelling.

DPERTPERImprovement.description: The improvement of Primary Energy Rating between the Target (TPER) and actual (DPER). Calculated as ( (TPER - DPER) / TPER).

DFEE.description: The Dwelling Fabric Energy Efficiency (DFEE) for the dwelling - calculated as part of the analysis.

TFEE.description: The Target Fabric Energy Efficiency (TFEE) for the dwelling.

DFEETFEEImprovement.description: The improvement of Fabric Energy Efficiency between the Target (TFEE) and actual (DFEE). Calculated as ( (TFEE - DFEE) / TFEE).

BlockDER.description: Calculation of the Dwelling Emission Rate (DER) multiplied by the total floor area for the dwelling type, calculated as the DER multiplied by FloorAreaByBlock.

BlockTER.description: Calculation of the Target Emission Rate (TER) multiplied by the total floor area for the dwelling type, calculated as the TER multiplied by FloorAreaByBlock.

BlockDPER.description: Calculation of the Dwelling Primary Energy Rating (DPER) multiplied by the total floor area for the dwelling type, calculated as the DPER multiplied by the FloorAreaByBlock.

BlockTPER.description: Calculation of the Target Primary Energy Rating (TPER) multiplied by the total floor area for the dwelling type, calculated as the TPER multiplied by the FloorAreaByBlock.

BlockDFEE.description: Calculation of the Dwelling Fabric Energy Efficiency (DFEE) multiplied by the total floor area for the dwelling type, calculated as the DFEE multiplied by the FloorAreaByBlock.

BlockTFEE.description: Calculation of the Target Fabric Energy Efficiency (TFEE) multiplied by the total floor area for the dwelling type, calculated as the TFEE multiplied by the FloorAreaByBlock.

_t.description: Optional Type discirminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
